import pytest

from gradebook.analytics import percentile


def test_percentile_at_100_returns_maximum_score():
    assert percentile([17, 3, 42, 9], 100) == 42
winning_test.targeted_behavior: At p=100, the computed index equals len(scores); the original clamps it to the last valid index while the mutant raises IndexError.
